## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is named after the issue (`feat/NNN-...` or `fix/NNN-...`)
- [ ] Only the files described in the change summary are modified
- [ ] README updated if skill count, rule count, or section content changed
- [ ] CI passes (build badge green)
- [ ] High-risk paths (`.claude/rules/`, `.claude/skills/`, `.github/workflows/`, `settings.json`) reviewed with extra scrutiny
- [ ] No `.env` files, secrets, or private keys included
